# Workflow Status Badges

Add these badges to your main README.md to show workflow status:

## Maven Build
```markdown
[![Maven Build](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/maven-build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/maven-build.yml)
```

## GraalVM Native Build
```markdown
[![GraalVM Native Build](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/graalvm-native.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/graalvm-native.yml)
```

## Performance Testing
```markdown
[![Performance Testing](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/performance-testing.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/performance-testing.yml)
```

## Security Scan
```markdown
[![Security Scan](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml)
```

## Combined Status
```markdown
[![CI](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/maven-build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions)
[![Native](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/graalvm-native.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions)
[![Performance](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/performance-testing.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions)
[![Security](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions/workflows/security-scan.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm/actions)
```

Replace `wso2/micro-integrator-graalvm` with your actual repository path.
